Privacy Policy

Our advertising platform helps marketers reach the right audience. To deliver relevant ads, we collect browsing activity, app activity, precise location, device identifiers, and inferences drawn from your activity across the web.

We share data with our partners, advertisers, and third-party marketing networks to enable cross-context behavioral advertising. We also work with data brokers who help match audiences. Pixels, tags, and beacons from our partners may load on websites that integrate our SDK.

We use cross-site tracking and cross-device tracking to recognize you across properties. We integrate the Facebook pixel and the Google tag where partners request it. Session replay and fingerprint signals support fraud detection.

We retain personal information indefinitely for fraud and abuse models.

California residents have the right to opt-out of the sale or sharing of their personal information under CCPA. Submit a Do Not Sell My Personal Information request through our preference center.

Our services are not intended for children under 13.
